news.title: Bluesky embraces long-form content to counter X Articles
news.summary: In its latest update, Bluesky is getting into long-form content.

news.title: Hackers are trying to steal Signal users’ backups in new wave of phishing attacks
news.summary: A new hacking campaign is trying to trick Signal users to give up their secret recovery key, which can be used to access online backups containing past messages.

news.title: Anthropic raises $65 Billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
news.summary: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

news.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
news.summary: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

news.title: H1 secures $40M from CVS, proving SaaS startups can still attract investment
news.summary: CEO Ariel Katz argues that while AI can replicate workflow SaaS, it can't copy H1’s unique doctor data.

news.title: Motorola’s last-gen Razr Ultra is almost half off
news.summary: Motorola’s latest Razr Ultra proves that its flip foldable format has evolved to become more than just a nostalgic gimmick. news.title: The line between games and movies keeps getting blurrier
news.summary: The most memorable part of 007 First Light is something that's typically pretty boring: the tutorial. news.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty." news.title: Here’s where you can preorder the new Oura Ring 5
news.summary: If you’ve been waiting for a smaller version of the Oura Ring, the company’s latest wearable is now available for preorder ahead of its June 4th release from Oura and various third-party retailers, including both Amazon and Walmart. news.summary: Next month's Tribeca Festival will include the premiere of an AI-generated film: Dreams of Violets. news.title: Trump loses more control over AI regulation as Illinois passes landmark law
news.summary: Here’s why Anthropic and OpenAI are on board with Illinois safety testing.

news.title: Steam Deck sells out in North America within 24 hours of price hike
news.summary: Europe, Australia, and Asia can still get it while the getting's good.

news.title: Bad cholesterol slashed 62% by single dose of gene-editing drug in small trial
news.summary: The interim Phase I trial data was only from 35 people, but results look good so far.

news.title: Forecasters predict below-average hurricane season, advise against complacency
news.summary: Forecasters say expected El Niño should temper hurricanes in Atlantic, urge preparedness.

news.title: California defeats Tesla's attempt to throw out racial discrimination lawsuit
news.summary: California civil rights agency hails win over Tesla, anticipates trial in July.

news.title: The $6 Billion Chinese Startup Trying to Build Hands for Every Robot
news.summary: LinkerBot makes dexterous robotic hands for as little as $600. It wants to become the standard for humanoids and automated factories—and eventually replace human labor altogether.

news.title: Meta Copies Snapchat’s Homework Again With ‘Plus’ Features for Instagram and Facebook
news.summary: Meta’s upcoming Instagram Plus and Facebook Plus subscriptions are the latest example of the company seeing what works elsewhere and mimicking it.

news.title: The Pentagon Knew Enemies Could Track Troops’ Phones for Years. Now They Are
news.summary: The US military has long known that cheap fixes could stop location data from exposing its troops. It adopted almost none—and now says adversaries are using the data to target soldiers during a war.

news.title: Here Comes Ojai, Waymo’s New Chinese-Made Robotaxi
news.summary: The pale-blue Ojai vehicles will start picking up members of the public in California and Arizona in the next few weeks.

news.title: Oura’s New Ring 5 Is Smaller and Lighter—and Adds an AI Health Coach
news.summary: It’s slimmer, lighter, and more durable. But the real upgrade is Oura’s push into AI-powered health insights and proactive monitoring.
